reviews.comment:
Excelente atención. Rápidos y serviciales. El único problema es la exposición al oleaje del Lujan..y estamos en argentina...imagínense que puede pasar...

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. Fast and helpful. The only problem is the exposure to the waves of the Luján River...and we're in Argentina...imagine what could happen...

reviews.comment:
Soy socio vitalicio del ACA. Debe ser la gasolinería más pobre de todas las pertenecientes al ACA. Está situada en un lugar de precaria accesibilidad. Lo único que tiene es combustible con surtidores muy fuera de tecnología-

(Translated by Google)
I'm a lifetime member of the ACA. It must be the poorest gas station of all the ACA members. It's located in a precariously accessible area. All it has is fuel with very outdated pumps.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14089662263619113914/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNDa183Si1BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Porque presise una pinza para desconectar la bateria de mi auto por un corto y no me la prestaron eso que son del automovil club se podria haber incendiado mi auto si era por el inconciente a cargo deberian poner gente capacitada para la atencion diga que salio un isleño y me presto una si no se hubera prendido fuego el auto y asi solucionamos el problema

(Translated by Google)
Because I needed jumper cables to disconnect my car battery due to a short circuit, and they wouldn't lend me one. They're from the automobile club, and my car could have caught fire if it had been because of the irresponsible person in charge. They should have trained staff on duty. Luckily, an islander came out and lent me one; otherwise, the car would have caught fire, and that's how we solved the problem.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14089662263619113914/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNDenFLTThnRRAB
